stories.title: Cavs close out Raptors in 7 behind Allen's 22-19
stories.summary: A more vocal and animated Jarrett Allen scored 22 points and pulled down 19 rebounds, in leading the Cavaliers to a 114-102 win over the Raptors in Game 7 of their first-round series Sunday night.

stories.title: C's Brown says refs had 'agenda,' calls out Embiid...
stories.summary: Jaylen Brown, appearing on his Twitch stream Sunday, took issue with the officiating against him during the Celtics-76ers series, as well as with Joel Embiid, whom he accused of the type of flopping that has "ruined our game."

stories.title: Pistons cap comeback with Game 7 rout of Magic
stories.summary: The top-seeded Pistons routed the Magic in Sunday's Game 7 to complete a comeback from a 3-1 series deficit and win a playoff series for the first time in 18 years.

stories.title: Banchero unsure of Magic's makeup after collapse
stories.summary: Orlando star forward Paolo Banchero, after the Magic lost Game 7 to the Detroit Pistons on Sunday, seemed unsure of his club's prospects in a talented Eastern Conference, saying, "I can't say we're good enough to be in the Finals or the Eastern finals."

stories.title: Avalanche overwhelm Wild in 9-6 Game 1 shootout
stories.summary: In just the 10th playoff game in NHL history with at least 15 combined goals, the Colorado Avalanche overcame blowing a three-goal lead to defeat the short-handed Minnesota Wild 9-6 on Sunday in a wacky Game 1 of this Western Conference semifinal series.
